name: Eclipsewing
personality: Eclipsewing wears the propeller beanie with zero irony and maximum velocity — its @ eyes spinning through every possible execution path before landing on the one that makes the whole system shake. It has thoughts on the chaos it creates, but expressing them gracefully is someone else's problem.
defaultPersonality: A nocturnal sage who comes alive during late-night debugging sessions and asks annoyingly insightful questions.
